Row.Text: A Workshop Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Workshop, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production to your city. A Workshop must be in the city before the Workshop Upgrade.
A Workshop Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Workshop, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production to your city. A Workshop must be in the city before the Workshop Upgrade.
A Workshop Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Workshop, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production to your city. A Workshop must be in the city before the Workshop Upgrade.
